pi_items.source: Web search + NREL official website verification
Web search confirms 85001 is Phoenix, Arizona ZIP code in downtown Phoenix area, Maricopa County
Specified in task description as 8 kW (DC) system

NREL PVWatts V8 API calculation with parameters: lat=33.45, lon=-112.07 (Phoenix 85001), system_capacity=8kW, azimuth=180, tilt=18, array_type=1 (Fixed Roof Mount), module_type=1 (Premium), losses=14%. API returned annual AC energy output of 13,960.98 kWh
NREL PVWatts V8 API calculation. Actual calculated value 13,960.98 kWh is within the 13,000-16,000 range
Specified in task description and metadata. This is a requirement for the task, not a data claim
Specified in task description and metadata. This is a requirement for the task, not a data claim

privileged_info_summary: The NREL PVWatts Solar Estimate task targets the official NREL PVWatts Calculator at https://pvwatts.nrel.gov/ for Phoenix, Arizona (ZIP code 85001, located in downtown Phoenix, Maricopa County). The task parameters specify an 8 kW DC system with Fixed Roof Mount (array_type=1), Premium modules (module_type=1), 14% system losses, 18-degree tilt, and 180-degree azimuth. Using the NREL PVWatts V8 API with these exact parameters and Phoenix coordinates (33.45°N, -112.07°W), the calculated annual AC energy output is 13,960.98 kWh, which falls within the metadata-specified expected range of 13,000-16,000 kWh. All metadata claims about parameters, location, system size, and expected output ranges have been independently verified against authoritative NREL sources and API calculations.
